description: On a straight road section between two 4-way intersections, the ego vehicle (green box) is heavily obstructed by a cluster of stopped or slow-moving adversaries (yellow boxes) directly ahead and to its sides. This traffic bottleneck completely blocks the ego's forward path, forcing it to remain stationary.

Traveling on an on-ramp, the ego vehicle (green box) attempts to merge onto a multi-lane highway while following directly behind a leading adversary (yellow box). As they reach the merge point, the ego vehicle must coordinate its speed and positioning not only with the vehicle ahead but also with multiple adversaries already established on the main road, managing the tight spacing to merge safely.

The ego vehicle is traveling down an on-ramp and merges onto a multi-lane straight road in a suburban area. A white car followed by a red truck are traveling on the main road to the rear-left of the ego vehicle, continuing straight in their lane. The presence of these oncoming vehicles requires the ego vehicle to safely time its merge ahead of them.

The ego vehicle is traveling down an on-ramp and merges onto a multi-lane straight road in a suburban area. A single red car is traveling ahead on the main road to the front-left of the ego vehicle, continuing straight in its lane. The ego vehicle must maintain a safe following distance as it completes its merge behind this leading vehicle.

The ego vehicle travels straight through a 4-way intersection from a lane marked with a stop sign on a multi-lane road in an urban area. An adversary vehicle approaching from the left cross-street executes a left turn into the same target road ahead of the ego vehicle. The ego vehicle must monitor this turning adversary to maintain a safe distance and avoid a potential conflict as they both enter the same roadway.

The ego vehicle travels straight through a 4-way intersection at night in an urban area, encountering multiple adversary vehicles entering the intersection simultaneously. An oncoming vehicle from the opposing arm executes a left turn across the ego's path, while multiple vehicles from the left cross-street enter the intersection to turn or proceed straight. The ego vehicle must halt or navigate carefully within the intersection to yield to these intersecting and turning adversaries to prevent a collision.

At a 4-way intersection, the ego vehicle (green box) moves straight ahead through the junction. Concurrently, an adversary (yellow box) from the right arm enters the intersection and executes a sharp left-hand turn, crossing into the path ahead of the ego vehicle.

The ego vehicle travels straight through a 4-way intersection from a lane marked with a stop sign on a multi-lane road in an urban area. An adversary vehicle approaching from the right cross-street executes a right turn into the same target lane ahead of the ego vehicle. The ego vehicle must monitor this leading adversary to maintain a safe following distance as they both proceed down the same roadway.

The ego vehicle travels on a multi-lane straight road in an urban area and intends to execute a left lane change at a 4-way intersection. A stationary red vehicle is positioned directly ahead of the ego vehicle at the intersection's stop line, temporarily blocking the lane. The ego vehicle must wait for this leading adversary to drive forward first before safely performing its lane change maneuver.

Initially traveling in the left lane, the ego vehicle (green box) intends to change lanes to the right to execute a right turn at an upcoming 4-way intersection. However, it is forced to slow down and wait due to stationary or slow-moving adversaries (yellow boxes) blocking both its current lane directly ahead and the adjacent right lane, preventing an immediate lane change.

The ego vehicle follows a lead vehicle straight through a T-junction at night in an urban area. An oncoming adversary vehicle approaches from the opposing arm and executes a left turn into the cross-street, while another adversary vehicle simultaneously approaches the junction from that right-arm cross-street. The ego vehicle must maintain a safe following distance behind its lead vehicle while monitoring both intersecting adversaries to pass safely through the junction.

Approaching a T-junction from a minor road, the ego vehicle (green box) attempts to turn right onto the main road. However, its maneuver is blocked by a queue of adversaries (yellow boxes) arriving from the right arm, with some passing straight through and others intending to turn left into the minor road, forcing the ego vehicle to yield and wait until the junction clears.

At a T-junction, the ego vehicle (green box) initiates a right-hand turn while an adversary (yellow box) approaching from the opposing arm simultaneously executes a left-hand turn into the same intersecting road.

The ego vehicle approaches a T-junction on a straight road in an urban area and intends to execute a left turn. Multiple adversary vehicles approaching from the right-arm cross-street intend to proceed straight through the junction, but all vehicles must pause and wait to allow a pedestrian to cross the road.

The ego vehicle approaches and passes straight through a signalized 4-way intersection in an urban area while multiple pedestrians cross the crosswalks. Concurrently, several adversary vehicles enter the intersection from the left, right, and opposing arms, executing turns or proceeding straight. The ego vehicle must navigate carefully through the intersection to safely clear both the pedestrian traffic and the cross-turning vehicular adversaries.

While attempting to pass straight through a 4-way intersection, the ego vehicle (green box) encounters crossing pedestrians along with multiple adversaries (yellow boxes) approaching from different arms of the junction. These intersecting movements require the ego vehicle to yield and carefully monitor the cross-traffic and pedestrian paths before safely continuing straight.

The ego vehicle passes straight through a 4-way intersection in misty, low-visibility conditions within an urban area. An adversary vehicle from the left cross-street and another from the opposing arm enter the intersection to turn or proceed straight, while a pedestrian is present near the crosswalk. The ego vehicle must proceed with heightened awareness to safely navigate past both the intersecting vehicular traffic and the pedestrian amid the reduced visibility.

The ego vehicle travels on a multi-lane road under clear, sunny weather conditions in an urban area and enters a roundabout to execute a left turn. A red adversary vehicle positioned in the left lane next to the ego enters the roundabout concurrently, navigating the inner lane alongside it. The ego vehicle must maintain its lane discipline and monitor this adjacent adversary to safely complete its turn through the roundabout.

Approaching a roundabout from the left lane, the ego vehicle (green box) intends to make a right turn but is improperly positioned. To correct its route, the ego executes a lane change into the right lane, directly impacting and cuttting off an approaching adversary (yellow box) already occupying that lane.

Approaching a roundabout on a multi-lane road, the ego vehicle (green box) travels alongside an adversary (yellow box) initially positioned in the left lane. As they enter and navigate the roundabout, the adversary cuts directly into the ego's lane, forcing the ego vehicle to react and adjust its behavior to avoid a collision.

On a straight road approaching a 4-way intersection, the ego vehicle (green box) follows a leading adversary (yellow box) that intends to execute a left turn. The leading vehicle is forced to yield to an opposing adversary travelling straight through the intersection from the opposite arm, which subsequently causes the ego vehicle to stop and wait behind it until the intersection clears.

The ego vehicle follows a leading red vehicle to execute a left turn through a signalized 4-way intersection in an urban area under clear weather. During the maneuver, adversary vehicles from both the opposing arm and the right-arm cross-street enter the intersection to proceed straight. The ego vehicle must maintain a safe following distance behind its lead vehicle while carefully monitoring the intersecting cross-traffic to complete its turn safely.

The ego vehicle executes a left turn at a 4-way intersection at night in an urban area. Multiple adversary vehicles approaching from the opposing arm proceed straight through the intersection, directly crossing the ego's intended path. The ego vehicle must yield to these oncoming adversaries and carefully time its maneuver to safely complete the left turn without conflict.

At a 4-way intersection, the ego vehicle (green box) attempts to execute a left turn amidst cross-traffic. The ego must yield to and navigate around approaching adversaries (yellow boxes), including one traveling straight from the opposing arm and another approaching from the left arm.
The ego vehicle is following a lane and is approaching an object that is driving in the same lane.
The ego vehicle is following a lane and is following a dynamic object.

The ego vehicle is driving forward on a multi-lane highway ramp approaching a diverging road under clear daylight conditions. The vehicle is involved in a sudden side-impact collision when a passenger car aggressively cuts across the gore area from the right highway exit ramp to force its way back onto the main road directly into the ego vehicle's path.

The ego vehicle is driving forward on a wet, two-lane rural road during a rainstorm. The vehicle is involved in a side-impact collision when an oncoming white passenger car attempts to overtake traffic, but aggressively cuts back into the ego vehicle's lane to avoid a catastrophic head-on collision with an oncoming vehicle.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under highly challenging environmental conditions, navigating a narrow, wet, and foggy rural road. The ego vehicle is suddenly forced under an emergency scenario when an adversary cuts into its lane to avoid a roadside hazard, resulting in a direct side-swipe collision.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under nighttime, low-visibility conditions on a highway. The ego vehicle is forced under an emergency braking scenario due to two passenger cars executing simultaneous, reckless maneuvers at a highway split, resulting in a rear-end collision.

The ego vehicle is traveling on a multi-lane roadway on a clear morning. The vehicle is involved in a sudden side-impact collision when it attempts to overtake a large cargo truck, which unexpectedly drifts to the left and invades the ego vehicle's lane.

On a clear daytime city road, a passenger car abruptly cuts across multiple lanes and merges directly in front of the ego vehicle, forcing heavy braking and creating a near-rear-end collision before traffic stabilizes.

The ego vehicle is driving slowly on a busy commercial street on a clear day. The vehicle is involved in a sudden low-speed collision when a grey passenger van on the right cuts sharply into the ego vehicle's path to steer around a parked motorcycle blocking its lane.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under clear daylight conditions on a divided highway. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking and swerving scenario due to a passenger car pulling out from the right shoulder and cutting completely across the highway lanes to make a left turn, resulting in a collision.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under clear, late-afternoon daylight conditions on a multi-lane highway. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking scenario when an invading passenger car cuts into the lane of the ego from the left, then hesitates and brakes due to a truck also merging from the right lane of the ego, causing a collision.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under clear daylight conditions on a multi-lane city street. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency swerving scenario when the passenger car directly ahead stops abruptly due to a turning vehicle blocking its path, causing the ego vehicle to veer into the adjacent left lane and side-swipe an oncoming car.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under clear daylight conditions on an urban roadway. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking and swerving scenario when it plans to navigate around a slow/stationary bus by changing lanes to the left, while another car from the far-left lane simultaneously cuts into the exact same lane, resulting in a side-swipe collision.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under overcast daylight conditions on a wide urban road approaching a large intersection. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking scenario when the front vehicle abruptly anchors its brakes upon the traffic light turning yellow, despite having already crossed the stop line and entered the intersection, resulting in a rear-end collision.

The ego vehicle is driving forward on a multi-lane city road on an overcast day. The vehicle is involved in a sudden side-impact collision when a passenger car pulls out from a left-hand junction to turn into the ego's lane. The ego vehicle could not anticipate or see the turning vehicle because its view of the junction was completely blocked by passing oncoming traffic.

The ego vehicle is driving forward on a narrow, snow-covered rural road under overcast winter daylight conditions. The vehicle is involved in a head-on or side-swipe collision when an oncoming light-colored passenger car loses traction on the icy road surface and skids directly into the ego vehicle's path.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under wintry, snowy road conditions on an urban street. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency swerving scenario when an oncoming taxi suddenly turns left directly across its path; due to the inability to perform full braking on the snow-covered surface, the ego vehicle swerves to yield, resulting in a head-on collision with another oncoming vehicle that was trailing behind the traffic queue.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under foggy daylight conditions on a narrow two-lane rural road. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking scenario when it attempts to overtake a stationary bus, but instead collides with a pedestrian crossing the road directly in front of the bus, whose presence was previously obstructed from the ego vehicle's view.

The ego vehicle is driving forward under nighttime conditions along a narrow, unlit rural village road. The ego vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking scenario when a pedestrian unexpectedly crosses the road from behind a passing oncoming truck, resulting in a collision as the ego vehicle cannot stop in time due to the low visibility and short detection distance.

The ego vehicle is driving forward at night on an unlit highway. The vehicle is forced under a sudden emergency braking and swerving scenario when a pedestrian in light-colored clothing unexpectedly walks across the highway lanes, completely invisible until illuminated by the ego vehicle's headlights.

The ego vehicle is driving on a multi-lane urban road at night. The vehicle is involved in a severe side-impact collision when a truck in the left lane panic-swerves sharply into the ego vehicle's lane to avoid hitting a pedestrian crossing the dark street.

The ego vehicle is driving forward on a two-lane residential road on an overcast day. The ego vehicle is involved in a sudden side-impact collision when the ittries to overtake a slow-moving grey sedan, which simultaneously turns left to exit the road, cutting directly into the ego vehicle's path.

The ego vehicle is exiting a large junction by making a left turn into a multi-lane city street during clear daylight conditions. The vehicle is involved in a side-impact collision when a passenger car cuts blindly across lanes from the right side of the junction to merge directly into the ego vehicle's path.

The ego vehicle is driving straight under clear daylight conditions on a rural road approaching an intersection. The vehicle is involved in a sudden side-impact collision when a silver passenger van on the right arm of the intersection drives straight across, failing to yield right-of-way and cutting directly into the ego vehicle's path.

In a rural or suburban area on a straight road, the ego vehicle is driving forward when a blue taxi pulls out from the right shoulder and cuts directly into the ego's lane. This sudden cut-in maneuver forces the ego vehicle to sharply decelerate from nearly 60 km/h to a complete stop to avoid a collision.

The ego vehicle is turning left at an intersection on a clear day. The vehicle is hit when a truck coming from the left runs a red light, speeding straight through the intersection and crashing into the side of the ego vehicle.
